scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.check: npm run check -w shared && npm run check -w frontend && npm run check -w backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w shared && npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint -w shared -- --fix && npm run lint -w frontend -- --fix && npm run lint -w backend -- --fix
scripts.test: npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run check && npm run test
